flash_sale_db_bottleneck.text: Your Main DB is hitting 100% CPU. How will you scale?

choices.impact: A cache reduces read load by 90%. Great for static or slow-changing data.
Replica handles read traffic, but increases consistency complexity.
Simple, but expensive and has a hard ceiling.

global_latency_cdn.text: Users in Asia are seeing 2s latency. What is your first move?

choices.impact: CDNs serve static assets from the edge, closer to users.
Lowers latency but vastly increases data replication complexity.

chat_reliability_bottleneck.text: Your real-time chat service is dropping messages during peak usage. How do you handle the surge?

choices.impact: Decouples producers from consumers. Great for reliability and async processing.
Direct push is fast but requires more connection management on the server.

newsfeed_fanout_conflict.text: Your 'Write-time Fanout' is slowing down for celebrities with 1M followers. What's the better feed strategy?

choices.impact: Fan out for normal users, but pull for 'mega-users' at read-time. Saves write-amplification.
Distribute feed writes across more shards. Faster reads but more complex writes.

distributed_lock_contention.text: Multiple servers are trying to update the same user balance simultaneously, causing race conditions. How will you coordinate?

choices.impact: Simple, high-performance locking. But beware of clock-skew issues.
Strongly consistent and reliable, but slower and more operationally complex.

serverless_cold_start_crisis.text: Your Lambda-based checkout service is timing out during peak load. Mitigate the cold start.

choices.impact: Eliminates cold starts by keeping functions warm, but increases costs.
Moving to containers avoids cold start overhead for steady-state traffic.

egress_cost_explosion.text: Your inter-region data transfer is costing more than your compute. How will you optimize?

choices.impact: Keep reads within the same region to avoid egress fees.
Optimizes network paths across the global backbone, potentially reducing egress.

pii_data_leak_prevention.text: An auditor found PII in your debug logs. What is your immediate fix?

choices.impact: Automatically redacts PII before it reaches the logging service.
Replace sensitive data with non-sensitive tokens throughout the system.
